voiceStyle.description: Boost your online sales with modern tools: digital QR Code menus, reservation and delivery systems through our platform, and much more!

features.description: Boost your online sales with modern tools: digital QR Code menus, reservation and delivery systems through our platform, and much more!

cards.apiDescription: Connect NextSaaS with your tools and automate voice workflows.
cards.videoDescription: Add voice, visuals, and subtitles all in one place.

cards.ttsPrompt: Describe the text you want to create, in any voice.

advantages.description: A comprehensive app for managing your store, tracking all orders, analyzing store performance and profits, and marketing to customers.

list.title: Sign Up Free
list.description: Visit ordrat.com, enter your business name, phone, and email. No credit card required.

list.title: Add Products
list.description: Upload photos, write descriptions, set prices. Our AI suggests best titles.

list.title: Customize Store
list.description: Choose a design template, add your logo and colors. Our team helps via free video call.

list.title: Go Live & Sell
list.description: Share your store link on WhatsApp and Instagram. Start accepting orders instantly.

integration.description: Easily connect NextSaaS Ai to Canva, Notion, Adobe, Google Slides, Webflow, and more.

result.description: See how brands use Ordrat to launch faster, scale content, and keep every customer interaction on-brand.
result.caseBody: SoundWave Studios boosts video output by 40% using AI-generated voices.
result.lessTime: less time spent on dubbing compared to traditional workflows.

testimonials.hotjar: We easily converted scripts into natural voices and scaled our ad campaigns faster than ever.
testimonials.stripe: The voice clarity and tone customization blew us away!
testimonials.notion: We instantly localize our campaigns with natural accents — no extra cost, no delays.
testimonials.scapic: Our explainer videos now sound professional without hiring multiple voice actors. It's a total game-changer.
